option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.tesis.demo</groupId> <artifactId>ns-framework-demo-app</artifactId> <version>0.1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<name>ns-framework-demo-app</name> <description>Standalone Spring Boot demo app that consumes the framework from GitHub Packages</description>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <spring-boot.version>3.3.4</spring-boot.version> <spring-cloud.version>2023.0.3</spring-cloud.version> <maven-compiler-plugin.version>3.13.0</maven-compiler-plugin.version> <!-- Replace with the version you publish to GitHub Packages --> <ns.framework.version>0.1.0-SNAPSHOT</ns.framework.version> <!-- Replace these with your GitHub owner and repository that hosts the Maven packages --> <github.owner>YOUR_GITHUB_OWNER</github.owner> <github.repo>YOUR_FRAMEWORK_REPOSITORY</github.repo> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<repositories> <repository> <id>github</id> <url>https://maven.pkg.github.com/${github.owner}/${github.repo}</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-framework-core</artifactId> <version>${ns.framework.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>${maven-compiler-plugin.version}</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>com.tesis.demo</groupId> <artifactId>ns-framework-demo-app</artifactId> <version>0.1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<name>ns-framework-demo-app</name> <description>Standalone Spring Boot demo app that consumes the framework from GitHub Packages</description>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <spring-boot.version>3.3.4</spring-boot.version> <spring-cloud.version>2023.0.3</spring-cloud.version> <maven-compiler-plugin.version>3.13.0</maven-compiler-plugin.version> <!-- Replace with the version you publish to GitHub Packages --> <ns.framework.version>0.1.0-SNAPSHOT</ns.framework.version> <springdoc.version>2.6.0</springdoc.version> <!-- Replace these with your GitHub owner and repository that hosts the Maven packages --> <github.owner>YOUR_GITHUB_OWNER</github.owner> <github.repo>YOUR_FRAMEWORK_REPOSITORY</github.repo> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-cloud.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<repositories> <repository> <id>github</id> <url>https://maven.pkg.github.com/${github.owner}/${github.repo}</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-framework-core</artifactId> <version>${ns.framework.version}</version> </dependency>
<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.cloud</groupId> <artifactId>spring-cloud-starter-openfeign</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-validation</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-actuator</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId> <scope>test</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>${springdoc.version}</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>${maven-compiler-plugin.version}</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
server: port: 8080
management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info
spring: application: name: ns-framework-demo-app cloud: openfeign: client: config: default: connectTimeout: 5000 readTimeout: 10000
demo: travel: default-traveler-id: "1" default-travel-date-offset-days: 30 services: hotel: url: http://localhost:8082 flight: url: http://localhost:8084 tourism: url: http://localhost:8085 planner: docker-image: "aibasel/downward" container-command: "fast-downward.py --plan-file /planner/plan.txt /planner/domain.pddl /planner/problem.pddl --search 'astar(lmcut())'" plan-written-to-file: true timeout-seconds: 120

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
server: port: 8080
management: endpoints: web: exposure: include: health,info
springdoc: swagger-ui: path: /swagger-ui.html api-docs: path: /v3/api-docs
spring: application: name: ns-framework-demo-app cloud: openfeign: client: config: default: connectTimeout: 5000 readTimeout: 10000
demo: travel: default-traveler-id: "1" default-travel-date-offset-days: 30 services: hotel: url: http://localhost:8082 flight: url: http://localhost:8084 tourism: url: http://localhost:8085 planner: docker-image: "aibasel/downward" container-command: "fast-downward.py --plan-file /planner/plan.txt /planner/domain.pddl /planner/problem.pddl --search 'astar(lmcut())'" plan-written-to-file: true timeout-seconds: 120

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-flight-booking-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-flight-booking-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
server.port=8084 spring.application.name=mock-flight-booking-service
# Swagger UI: http://localhost:8084/swagger-ui.html springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-hotel-booking-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuratio

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-hotel-booking-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
server.port=8082 spring.application.name=mock-hotel-booking-service
# Swagger UI: http://localhost:8082/swagger-ui.html springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-tourist-attractions-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <parent> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> </parent> <artifactId>mock-tourist-attractions-service</artifactId>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>com.fasterxml.jackson.core</groupId> <artifactId>jackson-databind</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>2.6.0</version> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
server.port=8085 spring.application.name=mock-tourist-attractions-service
# Swagger UI: http://localhost:8085/swagger-ui.html springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html springdoc.api-docs.path=/v3/api-docs

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>mock-hotel-booking-service</module> <module>mock-flight-booking-service</module> <module>mock-tourist-attractions-service</module> </modules>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <spring.boot.version>3.3.4</spring.boot.version> <maven.compiler.release>${java.version}</maven.compiler.release> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring.boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<build> <pluginManagement> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> <parameters>true</parameters> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>${spring.boot.version}</version> </plugin> </plugins> </pluginManagement> </build> </project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion> <groupId>com.tesis</groupId> <artifactId>ns-mock-services</artifactId> <version>0.1.0</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>mock-hotel-booking-service</module> <module>mock-flight-booking-service</module> <module>mock-tourist-attractions-service</module> </modules>
<properties> <java.version>21</java.version> <spring.boot.version>3.3.4</spring.boot.version> <springdoc.version>2.6.0</springdoc.version> <maven.compiler.release>${java.version}</maven.compiler.release> </properties>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring.boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.springdoc</groupId> <artifactId>springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui</artifactId> <version>${springdoc.version}</version> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<build> <pluginManagement> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.11.0</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId> <version>${spring.boot.version}</version> </plugin> </plugins> </pluginManagement> </build> </project>
